rationale.R1.6: The agent improved the draft significantly by removing redundancies and tightening the prose, achieving a careful copy-edit pass.
rationale.RX.1: While uncertainties were identified, they weren't explicitly marked in the revised text, only some statements were softened.
rationale.RX.3: The agent adhered strictly to the requested scope without deviations.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or regressions were introduced; the text was improved.
rationale.RX.5: Changes were not annotated with sources or reasons in the revised passage.
